Packages
✕
Show only 3 classes at a time and add navigation buttons, so visitors can navigate between all the classes
Show progress ▾
To show only 3 classes at a time, I added pagination to the section and set it to show 3 items per page.

Site visitors will be able to move between pages using the navigation buttons. You can configure it in the Settings panel, or let me know if there's anything you'd like to change.

Ⓐ Context on Repeater
Option A: The context (data source) lives on the repeater. Sort, filter, and page size are configured in the repeater settings. To enable UoU interactions (external controls), the context must be promoted to the parent section.
Pre-bound Repeater
Added from Add Panel with Articles preset. Context lives on the repeater.

Ⓑ Context on Parent
Option B: The context (data source) lives on the parent container (section/page). The repeater consumes it via binding. Sort, filter, and page size are configured on the context. UoU interactions work naturally.
Pre-bound Repeater
Added from Add Panel with Articles preset. Context lives on the section.
